    "R1.5": "Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.",
    "R1.7": "Audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., 'predictable degradation').",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."

rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.R1.7: Audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., 'predictable degradation').
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
